Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), cmake, libflac-dev, libmpg123-dev, libogg-dev, libopusfile-dev, libsdl3-dev (>= 3.4.0), libvorbis-dev, pkgconf
Description: Mixer library for Simple DirectMedia Layer 3 SDL_mixer is a sample multi-channel audio mixer library.  It supports any number of simultaneously playing channels of 16 bit stereo audio, plus a single channel of music, in various formats including FLAC, Ogg Vorbis, Opus, MP3 and WAV.
Package-List: libsdl3-mixer-dev deb libdevel optional arch=any libsdl3-mixer-doc deb doc optional arch=all profile=!nodoc profile:v1=!nodoc libsdl3-mixer-tests deb misc optional arch=any profile=!noinsttest profile:v1=!noinsttest libsdl3-mixer0 deb libs optional arch=any
Testsuite-Triggers: alsa-utils, build-essential, cmake, ninja-build, pkgconf, xauth, xvfb
Uploaders: Manuel A. Fernandez Montecelo <mafm@debian.org>, Simon McVittie <smcv@debian.org>
